name: PT Victoria Investama Tbk
summary: PT Victoria Investama Tbk, through its subsidiaries, provides financial services in Indonesia. It offers commercial banking products and services, which includes saving and current accounts, deposits, and investment products; and loan products, which include consumer and production credit. The company also operates as a security broker and underwriter for individual client, and local and foreign business entities; and manages securities and securities products, such as stocks, bonds, and other assets, including property. In addition, it offers general insurance products, such as assurance of property, motorized vehicles, personal accidents, transportation, engineering, money, liability, and boat frame to multi finance companies, banks, local government, state-owned enterprises, private companies, and individuals. Further, the company provides corporate finance and advisory management services, as well as act as a fund arranger. The company was formerly known as PT Victoria Sekuritas and changed its name to PT Victoria Investama Tbk in 2012. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Victoria Investama Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Gratamulia Pratama.
